title: troximon montanum
intro: Troximon montanum, also known as Meadow Saffron, is a perennial plant with yellow flowers that belongs to the saxifragaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as an antispasmodic and to reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Troximon montanum include relieving symptoms of menstrual cramps, indigestion, and other gastrointestinal issues, as well as providing relief from anxiety and insomnia. In herbal preparations, Troximon montanum can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, often combined with other herbs to enhance its effects and provide a balanced treatment.
